cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the answer to this question. The question is asking which word best describes Pieter when he fought with the crocodile. The options are clear-headed, frightened, regretful, or thoughtful. First, I need to read through Pieter's account of the incident again to get the details. From what I remember, Pieter was swimming with his horse when a crocodile attacked him. He initially thought it was a hippo but realized it was a crocodile. He started fighting immediately, hit the crocodile with his left arm, and then the crocodile bit his forearm. He mentions that he realized if he didn't stand up, his wife would never find him again.
